title: 気まぐれ天才魔法少女スイーピー☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking down the hallway, I hear some
students' voices.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What the heck's going on here?! This stuff's
totally in our way!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe they were used for an event? But there are
so many of them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see a huge pile of boxes stacked in front of
them. It looks like the boxes are blocking the
way.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Dang it! If we don't do something about this we'll
be late for class!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm going to blow them away with magic!
Here goes nothing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Raging torrent, wash away all in our way!
Chrysanthemum ☆ Splash!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Sparkles from the heavens, drive away all in our
sight! Oxypetalum ☆ Blue Star!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Hey, nothing's happening!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: B-be quiet! I just need to warm up is all!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: All right, it's time for a hero to step up! It's time for me to step up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait! I'm not ready to step down!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to work up to this, but it looks like I've
got no choice. Here comes my ultimate
incantation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho waves her wand. I have a feeling
things are about to get magical—no, physical!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Leave it to me! This is the magic my granny
always used to cast when she got into a fight with
my gramps!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ULTIMATE IMPACT!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BOOM! THWUMP! CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may be small, but she packs a punch! Dozens
of boxes are flattened in the blink of an eye!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Nice job, Sweep! Now we can waltz on
through!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, everything's a breeze when you've got a
genius magical girl by your side! ♪ I wanna cast
that magic again...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Crap, look at the time! We've gotta get to class!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll clean it up later with magic! Come on you two,
we need to book it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They rush away... I know Sweep Tosho said she'd
clean it up later, but I'd hate to leave such a
mess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to clean it up before anyone else comes
along.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Okay, now let's get back to—huh?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Everything's been tidied up! I must have
performed some subconscious magic!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey! Just what do you think you're all doing?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Yikes! We've been spotted!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Flower! Biko! We've gotta escape while we can!
We still have time to outrun her!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Tch, they got away. Hey you, do you know what
happened here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain the situation to Air Groove and
apologize for letting Sweep Tosho destroy the
boxes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. Looks like you got played by that naughty
girl.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But that does make you complicit. And you'll
need to take responsibility for your actions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I agree to Air Groove's terms and set about
cleaning diligently by myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear later that Sweep Tosho and the others were
also given a very stern lecture.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Why are you trying to stop me?!
choice_data_list: Your ultimate incantation is too powerful.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, you're right. There's no telling what'll
happen when I set it off.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, fine. I'll try a different type of magic
then. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: It's time for a command spell!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Cirsium ☆ Oxalis ☆ Iris! I command you two to
clean up these boxes!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Flower, I've folded the cardboard! What's
next?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Tie them up with string. Here, take this end of it
and...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, that'd be great! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us get to work cleaning up the
boxes. However...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ngh...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
How come you're all having such a blast?! You're
being forced to clean up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So it's come to this, has it?! I'm gonna have to
show you how it's done! Hand me that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling lonely as she watches us from the
sidelines, Sweep Tosho ends up joining in too.
